Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('openapi-tmp.json'\)\); print\('TITLE:', d.get\('info',{}\).get\('title'\), d.get\('info',{}\).get\('version'\)\); print\('---PATHS---'\); [print\(m.upper\(\).ljust\(7\), p\) for p,ms in sorted\(d['paths'].items\(\)\) for m in ms]")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('openapi-tmp.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('TITLE:', d.get\('info',{}\).get\('title'\), d.get\('info',{}\).get\('version'\)\); print\('---PATHS---'\); [print\(m.upper\(\).ljust\(7\), p\) for p,ms in sorted\(d['paths'].items\(\)\) for m in ms if m in \('get','post','put','patch','delete'\)]")
